title: Student Forms
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Student Forms
This page contains essential forms for managing your academic and administrative needs at NYU Shanghai. You can update your personal information, authorize the release of your records, or submit a withdrawal request.

text_blocks.text: This page contains essential forms for managing your academic and administrative needs at NYU Shanghai. You can update your personal information, authorize the release of your records, or submit a withdrawal request.
